name: Verifica_EdicionSolModPres
wl_code:
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 40, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado40 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 41, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado41 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 42, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado42 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 43, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado43 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 42, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nEstado43=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
ELSE IF nEstado43=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
END
nEstado42=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 39, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nEstado40=1 AND nEstado41=1 AND nEstado42=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
//ELSE IF nEstado40=0 AND nEstado41=0 AND nEstado42=0 THEN
//
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nEstado40=1 OR nEstado41=1 OR nEstado42=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
ELSE IF nEstado40=-1 OR nEstado41=-1 OR nEstado42=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
Local procedure Verifica_EdicionSolServicios
